settings.title: Theme Settings
settings.disabled_notice: Theme customization is disabled by server admin.

gameplay.cannot_play: Hold up! You can't perform any actions right now, partner.
gameplay.cannot_cancel: Easy there! Can't cancel that emote at the moment, chief.
gameplay.animal_error: What the hell?! You think you're some kind of animal? Get real!
gameplay.empty_slot: Nothing here! This quick slot is empty as a ghost town.
gameplay.request_rejected: Denied! They ain't interested in what you're offering.
gameplay.driving_error: Not while driving! Keep your hands on the wheel, hotshot.
gameplay.not_valid_emote: That's not a valid emote, my friend.
gameplay.invalid_emote: Please provide a valid emote name.

interruption.restored: Back in action! Continuing where you left off.
interruption.cancelled_damage: Ouch! That hurt like hell - emote interrupted!
interruption.cancelled_collision: Watch it! Got knocked around and lost focus.
interruption.cancelled_explosion: Holy shit! That explosion scared the hell out of me!
interruption.cancelled_gunshots: Gunfire! Hit the deck - emote cancelled!
interruption.cancelled_crash: Car crash! That loud crash broke your concentration!
interruption.cancelled_general: Interrupted! Something made you stop what you were doing.

system.dead: You can't use emotes while dead!
system.in_combat: You can't use emotes while in combat!
system.ragdolled: You can't use emotes while ragdolled!
system.getting_up: You're currently getting up, please wait!
system.swimming: You can't use emotes while swimming!
